description.value:
At 6th level, you unlock the ultimate power granted by your Sealed Beast. By fusing your chakra with that of the Sealed Beast in a manner akin to nuclear fusion, you enter Baryon Mode. This transformation represents the perfect balance of your human form and the Sealed Beast's power, creating a complete and enhanced version of yourself.

When you enter Baryon Mode, you gain the following benefits:

  • Speed: Your speed is increased by 240.
  • Stat Enhancements: Increase your Strength and Dexterity by +10.
  • Saving Throws: You gain a +9 bonus to all Saving Throws.
  • Vermilion Attacks: As an Action, you can make 3 Vermilion Attacks, dealing 8d12 + Proficiency Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage (DM discretion) using claws made of chakra.
  • Attack Rolls and Save DCs: You gain a +16 bonus to your attack rolls and Save DCs.
  • Melee Range: Your melee attacks increase their range by 50 feet.
  • Twisted Hit Points: You gain 500 Twisted Hit Points.
  • Damage Resistance: You gain Resistance to all damage.
  • Condition Immunity: You gain immunity to all conditions.
  • Regeneration: You regain 30 Hit Points and 30 Twisted Hit Points at the start of your turn.
  • Vermilion Art Techniques: You can cast Tier 6 Vermilion Art Techniques.
  • Fusion Chakra Shielding: If you fail a saving throw or are hit by an attack, you can spend Fusion Chakra up to the difference between your result and the Save DC or your AC and the attack roll. This increases your AC against that attack or your saving throw result by the amount spent.
  • Fusion Chakra Healing: You can spend any amount of Fusion Chakra to regain hit points equal to five times the Fusion Chakra spent.

You can end Baryon Mode as an Action on your turn.
